title: Monitoring, Logging, and Debugging — Getting help
text:
If your problem isn't answered by any of the guides above, there are variety of
ways for you to get help from the Kubernetes community.

The documentation on this site has been structured to provide answers to a wide
range of questions.
Concepts
explain the Kubernetes
architecture and how each component works, while
Setup
provides
practical instructions for getting started.
Tasks
show how to
accomplish commonly used tasks, and
Tutorials
are more
comprehensive walkthroughs of real-world, industry-specific, or end-to-end
development scenarios. The
Reference
section provides
detailed documentation on the
Kubernetes API
and command-line interfaces (CLIs), such as
kubectl
.
